---
title: "census 1920-1950"
author: "Korzak/Wells"
date: "2026-03-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(purrr)
library(googlesheets4)
library(janitor)
library(dbplyr)

#install.packages("DT")
library(DT)
```

# Import 1920-1950 U.S. Census data
### Filtered to just Cheltenham inmates and staff (Brandywine survey)
### 646 results
```{r include=FALSE}
census_all <- read_csv("./output/census_1920_50.csv")
```



```{r include=FALSE}
#Trim DF
census_dt <- census_all |> 
  select(
    decade,
    full_name,
    birth_date,
    role
  )
```



```{r}
datatable(census_dt,
           caption = "Cheltenham Boys, Staff in Census, 1920-1950",
 options = list(pageLength = 25))

```
